lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਥੁ ਦਰਬੁ ਸਭੁ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਕਛਹੂ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: arath darab sabh jo kichh deesai sang na kachhahoo jaaee |
lines.english: All your property and wealth, and all that you see - none of it will go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਨ ਅਰਾਧਹੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧਹੁ ਘਰੀ ਮੁਹਤਕ ਬੇਲਾ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiau na araadhahu mil kar saadhahu gharee muhatak belaa aaee |
lines.english: Why do you not worship and adore Him? Join together with the Holy Saints; any instant, your time shall come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਕਵਨ ਉਪਮਾ ਦੇਉ ਕਵਨ ਬਡਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak har har aaraadhahu kavan upamaa deo kavan baddaaee |2|
lines.english: Says Nanak, worship and adore the Lord, Har, Har. What praise, and what approval, can I offer to Him? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਸਦੇਸਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਕੈਸਾ ਕਹ ਮੋਹਨ ਪਰਵੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: dehu sadesaa prabh jeeo kaisaa keh mohan paravesaa |
lines.english: Give me news of my Dear God; where does the Enticer live?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਛਉ ਸੰਤ ਮੇਰੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: poochhau sant mero tthaakur kaisaa |
lines.english: I ask the Saints, what is my Lord and Master like?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਂ‍ੀਉ ਅਰਾਪਉਂ ਦੇਹੁ ਸਦੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: haneeo araapaun dehu sadesaa |
lines.english: I offer my heart, to one who brings me news of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੇ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੁਗਤਾ ਕਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਜੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan te mukataa ghatt ghatt jugataa keh na skau har jaisaa |
lines.english: He is liberated from bondage, joined to each and every heart. I cannot say what the Lord is like.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗ ਅੰਗ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਈ ਥਾਨ ਥਾਨੰਤਰ ਦੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: ang ang sukhadaaee pooran brahamaaee thaan thaanantar desaa |
lines.english: He is the Giver of peace to life and limb; God is totally permeating all places, interspaces and countries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਚਰਿਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਓ ਪੂਛੈ ਦੀਨੁ ਮੇਰੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕੈਸਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dekh charit naanak man mohio poochhai deen mero tthaakur kaisaa |3|
lines.english: Gazing upon His wondrous play, O Nanak, my mind is fascinated. I humbly ask, what is my Lord and Master like? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apune peh aaeaa |
lines.english: In His Kindness, He has come to His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਬਸਾਇਆ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਾਇਆ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: charan basaaeaa sant sangaaeaa agiaan andher gavaaeaa |
lines.english: His Feet are enshrined within, in the Society of the Saints; the darkness of ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਿ ਸੁ ਰਿਦਾ ਜਿਹ ਚਰਨ ਬਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su ridaa jih charan basaaeaa |
lines.english: Blessed is that heart, in which the Lord's Feet are enshrined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਉਲਾਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲੋੜੀਦਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bheaa pragaas ridai ulaas prabh lorreedaa paaeaa |
lines.english: The heart is enlightened and illumined and enraptured; God has been found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਠਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਵੂਠਾ ਮਹਾ ਅਨੰਦ ਸਹਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh naatthaa sukh ghar meh vootthaa mahaa anand sahajaaeaa |
lines.english: Pain is gone, and peace has come to my house. The ultimate intuitive peace prevails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak mai pooraa paaeaa kar kirapaa apune peh aaeaa |4|1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found the Perfect Lord; in His Kindness, He has come to His humble servant. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰੰਗ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਰਾਇ ਮਹਮੇ ਹਸਨੇ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: saarang kee vaar mahalaa 4 raae mahame hasane kee dhun |
lines.english: Vaar Of Saarang, Fourth Mehl, To Be Sung To The Tune Of Mehma-Hasna:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਕੁੰਜੀ ਪਾਹੂ ਨਿਵਲੁ ਮਨੁ ਕੋਠਾ ਤਨੁ ਛਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kunjee paahoo nival man kotthaa tan chhat |
lines.english: The key of the Guru opens the lock of attachment, in the house of the mind, under the roof of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਨ ਕਾ ਤਾਕੁ ਨ ਉਘੜੈ ਅਵਰ ਨ ਕੁੰਜੀ ਹਥਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak gur bin man kaa taak na ugharrai avar na kunjee hath |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Guru, the door of the mind cannot be opened. No one else holds the key in hand. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਰਾਗੀ ਨਾਦੀ ਬੇਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai raagee naadee bed |
lines.english: He is not won over by music, songs or the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜੋਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai suratee giaanee jog |
lines.english: He is not won over by intuitive wisdom, meditation or Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਸੋਗੀ ਕੀਤੈ ਰੋਜਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai sogee keetai roj |
lines.english: He is not won over by feeling sad and depressed forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਰੂਪਂ‍ੀ ਮਾਲਂ‍ੀ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai roopanee maalanee rang |
lines.english: He is not won over by beauty, wealth and pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਦਾਤਂ‍ੀ ਕੀਤੈ ਪੁੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai daatanee keetai pun |
lines.english: He is not won over by giving donations in charity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਭਵਿਐ ਨੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai teerath bhaviai nang |
lines.english: He is not won over by wandering naked at sacred shrines.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਭੇੜਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਭਿੜਿ ਸੂਰ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai bherr mareh bhirr soor |
lines.english: He is not won over by fighting and dying as a warrior in battle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਸੁੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai baahar baitthiaa sun |
lines.english: He is not won over by living alone in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਕੇਤੇ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਧੂੜ ॥
lines.translit: n bheejai kete hoveh dhoorr |
lines.english: He is not won over by becoming the dust of the masses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੀਜੈ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bheejai saachai naae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord is won over only by His Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਛਿਅ ਖਟ ਕਾ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: nav chhia khatt kaa kare beechaar |
lines.english: You may study the nine grammars, the six Shaastras and the six divions of the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਲਿਖੀਐ ਮਨ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa likheeai man kai bhaae |
lines.english: The account is written of the loves of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਣ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam bihoon mukat kiau hoe |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, how can anyone be liberated?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਭੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin bhee ant na paaeaa tohi |
lines.english: Even these cannot find the limits of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਸਿ ਦਿਨ ਉਚਰੈ ਭਾਰ ਅਠਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: nis din ucharai bhaar atthaar |
lines.english: You may recite the Mahaabhaarata.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh naanak naam pachhaaniaa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh, O Nanak, realizes the Naam. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਭਿ ਵਸਤ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naabh vasat brahamai ant na jaaniaa |
lines.english: Brahma, in the lotus of the navel, does not know the limits of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap niranjanaa jin aap upaaeaa |
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord Himself, by Himself, created Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਓਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape khel rachaaeon sabh jagat sabaaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself created the whole drama of all the world's play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਆਪਿ ਸਿਰਜਿਅਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun aap sirajian maaeaa mohu vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself formed the three gunas, the three qualities; He increased the attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਭ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sach varatadaa sabh sach samaaeaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord is pervading everywhere; all are contained within the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ubare jin bhaanaa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they are saved - those who love the Will of God.
